allow: Bash(gh pr list --repo NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM --head user/junyix/fix-nvbug-6038228 --json number,title,body,state --jq '.')

Bash(git commit -s -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
[https://nvbugs/6038228][fix] Propagate event loop errors to await_responses callers

- When PyExecutor._event_loop_wrapper catches an exception \(e.g. KV cache
  OOM\), call _handle_errors to send error responses to all active requests
  so callers blocked in await_responses receive the error promptly instead
  of hanging indefinitely.
- Store the exception in _event_loop_error for downstream propagation.
- Fix _await_single_response to check is_shutdown and raise RuntimeError
  with the original error, preventing indefinite hangs when the event loop
  thread dies.
- Guard wait_on_pp_send_handles in _executor_loop_cleanup with try/except
  so the shutdown notification always reaches waiting threads even if PP
  send handles are in a broken state.
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --repo NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM --base main --head JunyiXu-nv:dev-junyix-fix-nvbug-6038228 --title "[https://nvbugs/6038228][fix] Propagate event loop errors to await_responses callers" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- When the PyExecutor event loop thread crashes \(e.g. KV cache OOM\), callers blocked in `await_responses` / `_await_single_response` hang indefinitely because no response is ever enqueued and `is_shutdown` is never checked.
- Store the exception in `_event_loop_error` and call `_handle_errors` to send error responses to all active requests so callers receive the error promptly.
- Fix `_await_single_response` to check `is_shutdown` and raise `RuntimeError` with the original exception, preventing indefinite hangs.
- Guard `wait_on_pp_send_handles` in `_executor_loop_cleanup` with try/except so the shutdown notification always reaches waiting threads even if PP send handles are in a broken state.

## Test plan
- [x] Added unit tests in `tests/unittest/_torch/executor/test_py_executor.py` covering:
  - Shutdown with stored error raises `RuntimeError` with original error
  - Shutdown without error still raises instead of blocking
  - Normal path \(response exists\) returns immediately
  - Response enqueued before shutdown is returned \(not discarded\)
  - Timeout without shutdown returns empty list \(legacy behaviour\)
  - Cross-thread scenario: main thread unblocks when background thread sets shutdown
- [ ] Run `pytest tests/unittest/_torch/executor/test_py_executor.py`
- [ ] CI: `/bot run`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
